title: THUG Invitational

{{DISPLAYTITLE:THUG Invitational}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=THUG Invitational |icon= |tickername=THUG Invitational |shortname=THUG Invitational |image=Loco Thug Invitational.jpg |type=Online |team_number=20 |series=THUG Invitational |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://villageresports.in/ Villager |organizer2=Thug |organizer2-link= |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=2,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-14 |edate=2021-08-15 |twitter= |instagram=8bit_thug |web= |discord=Nvs4KXpG |facebook= |loco=streamers/Thugwa |youtube=channel/UCV01cEjT9EGakHXILA_uZOQ |next=THUG_Invitational/Season_3{{!}}Season 3 }} '''[[Thug]]''' in association with '''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''' present a Battlegrounds Mobile invitational tournament for India called the '''THUG Invitational''' with a prize pool of ₹2,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=K18 |b2=RA1|b2flag=in|b2name=Vipul Kumar }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''THUG Invitational:''' 14th August 2021 to 15th August 2021.'' * ''20 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''6 matches to be played over a period of 2 days.'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-16}}||1 |- |{{Placement|17-20}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹2,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $2694 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
